name: mallow-site
description: Static Mallow storefront with Stripe Checkout backend.

scripts.check:server: node --check server.js && node --check products.js && node --check lib/order-store.js && node --check lib/product-page.js && node --check scripts/migrate-db.js && node scripts/check-order-store.js
scripts.check:seo: node --check lib/static-seo.js && node --check lib/product-page.js && node --check scripts/check-seo.js && node scripts/check-seo.js
scripts.preflight: node --check server.js && node --check products.js && node --check lib/order-store.js && node --check lib/product-page.js && node --check lib/static-seo.js && node --check scripts/migrate-db.js && node --check scripts/check-order-store.js && node scripts/check-order-store.js && node --check scripts/preflight.js && node scripts/preflight.js && npm run check:seo
